title: VR+
description: This is a vanilla+ modpack but in VR! With incredible Graphics!
body:
The VR+ Modpack for Minecraft is a vanilla+ experience, but in VR. That means it is primarily VR, but it is still playable without VR. It features many common vanilla+ mods and adds features like new structures or new villager jobs. However, it focuses on being as close to vanilla as possible.
You need SteamVR to play this modpack in VR.
